mlflow._help: Per-deployment overrides live in ENV.client.io.sinkOverrides.mlflow. The MLflow credential does NOT belong here — declare a server proxy alias under server.secure.proxies.<proxy> with Authorization: Bearer <% MLFLOW_TOKEN %>. See README.md.
mlflow._security: proxy, baseURL, auth and experimentAllow are trusted deployment config and are never resolvable from a session bundle. Mappers may shape structure only; they can never choose an endpoint or relax auth.
